doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents structural subsections, definitional language, and specific claims (e.g., "no recognized emergency exception," named state disciplinary actions) not found in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The real ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses unauthorized and multijurisdictional practice but does not contain subsections (a), (b), and (c) structured this way, nor does it include the invented definitional language about "practice of law," the specific paralegal supervision provisions, or the fabricated "no recognized emergency exception" claim with named state disciplinary examples—all of which appear to be invented elaborations not found in the actual ABA text.
